title: Create: More Wrenchables
description: Allows the Create Wrench to pickup more blocks while staying within the scope of what Create already allows
body:
![Create More Wrenchables logo, it is similar to the create logo with the blueprint background and giant Create Wrench in the center with a bold white outline, but behind it is a Create Seat, a Minecraft copper bulb, Cauldron and Dispenser also with bold white outlines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f880ad1d2aea191ba50cbb20c6fb02a4dcf7be.png)

Create: More Wrenchables

Create: More Wrenchables allows the Create Wrench to pickup more blocks while trying to stay within the scope of what Create already allows it to. This includes more bloccks from the redstone tag, more functional blocks and others, feel free to leave suggestions on if you think more blocks should be added

Currently Added:

  • Copper Bulbs
  • Lanterns
  • Dispensars/Droppers/Crafters
  • Cauldrons
  • Beacons
  • Conduits
  • Iron Bars
  • End Rods
  • Lightning Rods
  • Decorated Pots
  • Jukebox
  • Calibrated Skulk Sensor
  • Redstone Block
  • Create Seats
  • Chains
  • Tinted Glass
  • Furnace + Variants
  • Work Stations
    • Brewing Stand
    • Fletching Table
    • Grindstone
    • Smithing Table
    • Composter
    • Stone Cutter
    • Loom
    • Lectern
